name: project-facts-kit
description: Project facts and low-token context workflows for Codex teams.

interface.shortDescription: Keep project facts, handoffs, and low-token reads consistent.
interface.longDescription: Project Facts Kit packages two Codex skills: one for maintaining project facts and one for low-token multi-repo context control. Use the npm CLI to install templates and generate audit/status files; use this plugin to make the Codex workflow available to teammates.
defaultPrompt: Use Project Facts Kit to inspect this repo.
Audit project facts and handoff state.
Plan a low-token read path for this task.
